allow: Bash(sed -i '' -e 's#\\[\\[Annabella Urrego\\]\\]#*Annabella Urrego*#g' -e 's#\\[\\[Evaluna Urrego\\]\\]#*Evaluna Urrego*#g' wiki/people/mariana-rodriguez.md)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\(f'Count: {len\(d.get\(\\"value\\",d if isinstance\(d,list\) else []\)\)}'\); [print\(f'  {m.get\(\\"receivedDateTime\\",\\"?\\"\)[:10]} | {m.get\(\\"subject\\",\\"?\\"\)[:60]}'\) for m in \(d.get\('value',d if isinstance\(d,list\) else []\)\)[:5]]")
